calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerard Launay specially appearing for Attorney Faye Lee on behalf of Benson Wong.

Mr. Launay stated that he agrees with the Probate Examiner's conclusion, that there are problems with the will, that it makes sense to have the same Executor and that he thinks the case is headed to go forward intestate. Mr. Launay also stated that he will file a new petition and that he is comfortable taking the position of taking this petition off calendar. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar. The Clerk informed Counsel to file the new petition under the same case number.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Continued To Dec-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
